---
id: get-config
title: "GetConfig"
description: "Retrieves config data with context evaluation, including applicable contexts, overrides, and default values based on provided conditions."
sidebar_label: "GetConfig"
hide_title: true

  children={"GetConfig"}

</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/config"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves config data with context evaluation, including applicable contexts, overrides, and default values based on provided conditions.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

Keys define dimension names and values specify the criteria that must be met.","title":"Condition"},"priority":{"type":"number"},"weight":{"type":"number"},"override_with_keys":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"maxItems":1,"minItems":1}},"required":["condition","id","override_with_keys","priority","weight"],"title":"ContextPartial"}},"overrides":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":{},"description":"Configuration overrides that replace default values when context conditions are met. Keys represent configuration keys and values are the override data.","title":"Overrides"},"title":"OverridesMap"},"default_configs":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":{},"description":"Generic key-value object structure used for flexible data representation throughout the API.","title":"Object"},"dimensions":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":{"type":"object","properties":{"schema":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":{},"description":"Generic key-value object structure used for flexible data representation throughout the API.","title":"Object"},"position":{"type":"number"},"dimension_type":{"oneOf":[{"type":"object","title":"REGULAR","properties":{"REGULAR":{"type":"object","title":"Unit"}},"required":["REGULAR"]},{"type":"object","title":"LOCAL_COHORT","properties":{"LOCAL_COHORT":{"type":"string"}},"required":["LOCAL_COHORT"]},{"type":"object","title":"REMOTE_COHORT","properties":{"REMOTE_COHORT":{"type":"string"}},"required":["REMOTE_COHORT"]}],"title":"DimensionType"},"dependency_graph":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"title":"DependencyGraph"},"value_compute_function_name":{"type":"string"}},"required":["dependency_graph","dimension_type","position","schema"],"title":"DimensionInfo"},"title":"DimensionData"}},"required":["contexts","default_configs","dimensions","overrides"],"title":"GetConfigResponseContent"}}}},"500":{"description":"InternalServerError 500 response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"message":{"type":"string"}},"title":"InternalServerErrorResponseContent"}}}}}}
